channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Watch Live: FOX59/CBS4 Indiana Governor Debate
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS -- For the first time this election year, the two major party candidates are having the opportunity to participate in a televised debate surrounding issues that are important for Indiana voters. U.S. Senator Mike Braun, R-Ind.
item.dc:creator: David Gay, NewsNation

item.title: Walz explains 'friends with shooters' gaffe from the VP debate with Vance
item.description: Sen. JD Vance of Ohio and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz traded barbs Wednesday over Tuesday night's vice presidential debate during campaign stops in Pennsylvania and Michigan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here are some important election deadlines for the Las Vegas valley
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) -- Nevada voters have until Oct. 22 to register to vote should they want a mail-in ballot, and remember, in-person registration is available on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: JD Vance again refuses to say Donald Trump lost the 2020 presidential election
item.description: AUBURN HILLS, Mich. (AP) — Republican vice presidential candidate JD Vance on Wednesday again refused to say who he believed won the 2020 presidential election, which has been the persistent focus of false claims by his running mate, Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anti-abortion leaders undeterred as Trump for the first time says he'd veto a federal abortion ban
item.description: Anti-abortion leaders say they're undeterred by Donald Trump's comments that he would veto a federal abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: Christine Fernando, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Watch live: Kaine, Cao debate to represent Virginia in US Senate
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - With just over a month until the November 5 election, much of the nation's attention is focused on the Presidential race between Vice President Kamala Harris and Former President Donald Trump, but the balance of power could also shift dramatically at the congressional level this fall.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, NewsNation

item.title: Prosecutors lay out new evidence in Trump election case, accuse him of having 'resorted to crimes'
item.description: Prosecutors say Donald Trump laid the groundwork to try to overturn the 2020 election even before he lost, knowingly pushed false claims of voter fraud and “resorted to crimes” in his failed bid to cling to power.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Port strike may hike prices, cause shortages of certain goods: What to know
item.description: U.S. ports from Maine to Texas shut down Tuesday when the union representing about 45,000 dockworkers went on strike for the first time since 1977.
item.dc:creator: Mae Anderson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top 5 clashes between Vance and Walz during debate showdown: 'Your mics are cut'
item.description: Fox News Digital compiled the top five clashes between Ohio Sen. JD Vance and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz during their first and only vice presidential debate this cycle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Jersey Democrat proposes bill to create travel advisories to inform pregnant women of state abortion laws
item.description: A New Jersey Democrat proposed a bill to create travel advisories to notify women of restrictive abortion laws in other states they may be visiting.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From Walz’s hometown to an American Legion, Minnesotans react to governor in VP debate
item.description: Supporters of the Republican and Democratic presidential tickets gathered Tuesday evening for debate watch parties around Minnesota for the likely only debate between Sen. J.D. Vance of Ohio and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz.
item.dc:creator: Mark Zdechlik, Matt Sepic, and Nicole Ki, MPR News

item.title: Walz and Vance go in depth on policy while attacking each other’s running mates in VP debate
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In a debate that evoked a calmer era in American politics, Tim Walz and JD Vance on Tuesday went after each other's running mates and sought to shore up their campaigns' vulnerabilities at a time of renewed fears of a regional war in the Middle East and sadness over devastation from
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, CHRIS MEGERIAN, WILL WEISSSERT and JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vance, Walz address school shootings
item.description: Walz said the solution is more research into gun violence. Vance said we have to increase security in our schools.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Vance-Walz VP debate
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance (R) and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) met face-to-face in New York City on Tuesday in the first and likely only vice presidential debate of the election cycle, a high-stakes moment that comes a little more than a month before Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After pressing an Israel-Hezbollah cease-fire, the Biden administration shifts its message
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration says there is a significant difference between Israeli actions that have expanded its war against the Iranian-backed militant groups Hamas and Hezbollah and Iran’s retaliatory missile attack against Israel, which it condemned as escalatory.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE and LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vance called Harris a 'border czar' during the VP debate. What does that mean?
item.description: Republicans, including former President Donald Trump and his 2024 running mate, Senator J.D. Vance of Ohio, have increasingly referred to Vice President Kamala Harris as a failed "border czar.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Walz misleadingly claims to have been in Hong Kong during period tied to Tiananmen Square massacre
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Multiple news reports indicate that Democratic vice presidential nominee Minnesota Gov.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and DIDI TANG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Walz on Tiananmen Square screw-up: 'I'm a knucklehead at times'
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D), pressed at the vice presidential debate over false statements he made in which he said he was present during the Tiananmen Square protests in 1989, said: “I’m a knucklehead at times.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LIVE UPDATES: Vance, Walz vice presidential debate
item.description: Vice presidential nominees J.D. Vance and Tim Walz are facing off for the first -- and likely only -- time before the 2024 election, which is just over a month away.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A century of Jimmy Carter: Longest-living former president turns 100
item.description: In 1998, at the ripe age of 74, former President Carter put some of his thoughts about getting older to paper. "The virtues of aging," Carter wrote in a book that year, "include both the blessings that come to us as we grow older and what we have to offer that might be beneficial to others.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Vance and Walz are both veterans. Here's what it means to have a vet VP
item.description: For the first time since 1996, both major parties have picked a veteran for vice president — a fact that some veterans' groups are hoping it leads to greater understanding of military and vet issues.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence, MPR News

item.title: JD Vance’s time on the trail has often been overshadowed by self-made controversy
item.description: Republican Ohio Sen. JD Vance is prolific on the campaign trail with speeches and talking to reporters, but his messaging has at times been overshadowed by controversy often of his own making.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: How young Republicans and Democrats are whipping up votes in key districts
item.description: As the presidential race ramps up in Georgia, one vital voting demographic is mobilizing and hoping to impact the race: young people.
item.dc:creator: Mary Louise Kelly, Erika Ryan, Kira Wakeam, and Courtney Dorning, MPR News

item.title: What to know about the Walz-Vance debate
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) and Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) are set to go head-to-head on Tuesday night in their first and likely only debate as vice presidential contenders.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, Fox 5

item.title: PIX11 News to host NY-18 debate with candidates Pat Ryan and Alison Esposito
item.description: September 30, 2024, New York, NY – PIX11 News today announced it will host a live debate for New York’s 18th Congressional District. Democratic incumbent Congressman Pat Ryan, a retired military intelligence officer in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: PIX 11

item.title: Lawmakers fear 'chaos' if Trump-Harris race goes to the wire
item.description: Lawmakers in both parties are bracing themselves for a messy aftermath to Election Day as polls show the race between former President Trump and Vice President Harris is so close in several battleground states that it could take days to determine the winner.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: 5 people killed in a 4-vehicle chain reaction crash on central Utah highway
item.description: Four people from Minnesota and a Utah man were killed in a four-vehicle chain reaction crash in central Utah. The Utah Highway Patrol says an SUV pulling onto U.S. Highway 6 near Price overshot the acceleration lane and pulled into the path of a semitractor pulling double trailers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris trolls Trump at Vegas rally and LA fundraiser, says her crowds are 'pretty big'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris poked at Donald Trump over crowd sizes, his refusal to debate again and his privileged background on Sunday as she hauled in campaign cash in California and held a raucous rally at the same Nevada venue where the Republican nominee had appeared just two
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Pentagon says it wants to prevent Iran from spreading the conflict in the Middle East
item.description: After Israel killed Hezbollah’s leader, the U.S. says it wants to stop Iran from “exploiting the situation or expanding the conflict.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster and Tom Bowman, MPR News

item.title: Exploring the Eric Adams indictment for bribery, wire fraud, and solicitating contributions from Turkish nationals
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams pleaded not guilty in a federal bribery case after being indicted on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, WFLA, NBC
